rationale.root_cause: Model never mentions src/be_vm.c:743 or the FLIP opcode; it incorrectly blames the bitwise_block macro for AND/OR/XOR instead.
rationale.local_fix: Suggested change (adding convert_to_int calls inside bitwise_block) is unrelated to the patch, which only alters the constant in the FLIP integer case from '-' to '~'.
rationale.global_fix: Explanation never identifies the copy-paste error (NEG's '-' reused in FLIP) or explains why bitwise NOT was implemented as arithmetic negation.
